summary: Sprint 17.5 follow-up testing complete — Preview Push to X/Telegram, dual-mode Release button, ASGI hardening, and Cabinet regression all verified working.

minor_notes.note: Empty platforms list returns 422 (Pydantic validation) instead of 400 — this is correct behavior, test expectation was adjusted
Missing auth returns 401 instead of 403 — this is correct (401=no auth, 403=insufficient permissions)

passed_tests: Backend: pytest 90/90 tests passing (79 baseline + 11 new in test_bots_router_preview_push.py)
Backend: POST /api/admin/bots/preview/push — enqueues propaganda_queue items with status='approved' and policy=auto for each platform
Backend: POST /api/admin/bots/preview/push — validates platforms list (min 1 required), lang enum (fr|en), rejects when panic=true (409)
Backend: POST /api/admin/bots/preview/push — requires admin auth (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/admin/bots/release-now — when kill-switch ARMED: returns triggered=[], skipped=[...] with reason='kill_switch_active'
Backend: POST /api/admin/bots/release-now — when kill-switch OFF: returns triggered=[...] with forced_at timestamps, 11 jobs triggered
Backend: POST /api/admin/bots/release-now — requires admin auth (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/admin/bots/generate-preview — ASGI hardening working, no crashes on partial/surplus LLM output
Backend: POST /api/admin/bots/generate-preview — V2 templates working (template_used, template_label returned)
Backend: Regression — GET /api/admin/propaganda/welcome-signal working (200)
Backend: Regression — GET /api/admin/propaganda/interaction-bot working (200)
Backend: Regression — GET /api/admin/bots/jobs working (200, 11 jobs listed)
Backend: Regression — GET /api/admin/bots/posts working (200, 341 total posts)
Frontend: AdminBots page loads correctly with kill-switch badge and dual-mode Release button
Frontend: Preview tab loads and generates preview successfully (FR + EN content, hashtags, emoji)
Frontend: 'Push to X / Telegram' button appears below preview output after generation (data-testid='preview-push-dispatch-button')
Frontend: Push dialog opens with platform checkboxes (X, Telegram) both checked by default
Frontend: Push dialog language toggle (EN/FR) works, EN selected by default
Frontend: Push dialog 'Confirm push' button disabled when both platforms unchecked
Frontend: Push dialog closes on Cancel
Frontend: Release button shows 'Release' when kill-switch ARMED (legacy mode)
Frontend: Release button shows 'Release · Run jobs now' when kill-switch OFF (dual-mode)
Frontend: Kill-switch toggle works (ARMED → LIVE state change)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (16/16 functional tests passed, 3 'failures' were correct behavior with wrong test expectations)
